recommendations.title: Under the Skin
recommendations.overview: A seductive stranger prowls the streets of Glasgow in search of prey: unsuspecting men who fall under her spell.

recommendations.title: Sexy Beast

recommendations.title: Birth

recommendations.title: The Champion
recommendations.overview: It is 1940. The first transport of prisoners arrives at the newly created concentration camp Auschwitz. One of them is Tadeusz “Teddy” Pietrzykowski, pre-war boxing champion of Warsaw. The camp officers force him to fight in the ring for his and othe

recommendations.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
recommendations.overview: When his family moves from their home in Berlin to a strange new house in Poland, young Bruno befriends Shmuel, a boy who lives on the other side of the fence where everyone seems to be wearing striped pajamas. Unaware of Shmuel's fate as a Jewish pr

recommendations.title: Shoah
recommendations.overview: Director Claude Lanzmann spent 11 years on this sprawling documentary about the Holocaust, conducting his own interviews and refusing to use a single frame of archival footage. Dividing Holocaust witnesses into three categories – survivors, bystander

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
recommendations.overview: In the years before World War II, a penniless Japanese child is torn from her family to work as a maid in a geisha house.

recommendations.title: The Photographer of Mauthausen

recommendations.title: Naked Among Wolves
